case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. FAIRMONT SPECIALTY

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRMONT SPECIALTY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAIRMONT SPECIALTY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
